top_signals.title: Stocks Drop as Higher Bond Yields Weigh; Oil Falls: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Technology stocks led losses in Asian equity markets as higher bond yields around the world put a question mark on valuations after a record-breaking rally led by artificial intelligence shares.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
